creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended


Mail to submitter bounces with the message: 
Host or domain name not found. Name service error 
for name=sdf.lonestar.net type=AAAA: Host not found 
set this ticket into suspended mode. 
Submitter, if you see this message, please provide us with a valid email 
address to communicate or fix your DNS problems. We'll be happy to reopen 
this ticket if we're able to talk with you! ;)
